scripts.dev:infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis meilisearch minio
scripts.dev:infra:down: docker compose stop postgres redis meilisearch minio
scripts.dev:api: npm run dev:infra:up && DATABASE_URL=${DEV_HOST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://erp:erp@127.0.0.1:55432/erp_retail} npm run dev --workspace @erp/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @erp/shared && npm run build --workspace @erp/ui && npm run build --workspace @erp/api && npm run build --workspace @erp/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @erp/shared && npm run lint --workspace @erp/ui && npm run lint --workspace @erp/api && npm run lint --workspace @erp/web
